name: Light Switch
description: Simple IoT light switch demo with real-time state sync and load balancing

topics.name: button-state
topics.description: Light on/off state broadcast to all connected clients

readme:
# Light Switch

## Description
A simple IoT-style light switch that syncs state in real-time across all connected browser tabs. Demonstrates basic pub/sub messaging and optional load balancing (round-robin message delivery).

## Getting Started
1. Install dependencies: `npm install`
2. Start the dev server: `npm run dev`
3. Enter your NoLag access token and click Connect
4. Open in multiple tabs to see the light toggle sync across all of them

## Architecture
- Single topic (`button-state`) carries the on/off state
- All clients subscribe to the same room and topic
- Toggle in one tab broadcasts to all other tabs
- Optional load balancing mode: only one tab receives each toggle (round-robin)

## NoLag Features Used
- **Pub/Sub messaging** for real-time state sync
- **Echo suppression** (echo: false) so the sender doesn't receive its own toggle
- **Load balancing** with `loadBalance: true` and `loadBalanceGroup` for round-robin delivery
- **Auto-ACK** for confirming message delivery in load-balanced mode
